exploration_notes: Wrote integration tests at /workspace/scanner/scanner_integration_test.go covering the full scanning pipeline. The test file contains 16 test functions covering: (1) File discovery via walkDirTree and loadAllAudioFiles, including hidden directory filtering and .ndignore support; (2) Metadata extraction via metadata.NewTag with full tag parsing and empty/invalid tag fallbacks; (3) Metadata-to-model mapping via MediaFileMapper.ToMediaFile including ID generation, default values for missing fields,
